name: unocss
description: UnoCSS instant atomic CSS engine, superset of Tailwind CSS. Use when configuring UnoCSS, writing utility rules, shortcuts, or working with presets like Wind, Icons, Attributify.

interface.shortDescription: UnoCSS instant atomic CSS engine, superset of Tailwind CSS
interface.longDescription: UnoCSS instant atomic CSS engine, superset of Tailwind CSS. Use when configuring UnoCSS, writing utility rules, shortcuts, or working with presets like Wind, Icons, Attributify.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Unocss for my current task.
